allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('keys:', list\(d.get\('data',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('users:', d.get\('data',{}\).get\('users'\)\); print\('source keys:', list\(\(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('source'\) or {}\).keys\(\)\) if d.get\('data',{}\).get\('source'\) else 'no source'\); p=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('post'\) or {}; print\('post keys:', list\(p.keys\(\)\)\); print\('updated:', p.get\('updated'\), p.get\('post_modified'\), p.get\('post_date'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/wiki_resp.json'\)\); print\('data keys:', list\(d.get\('data',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\(\); print\('post keys:', list\(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('post',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\(\); print\('users:', d.get\('data',{}\).get\('users'\)\); print\(\); src=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('source'\); print\('source:', type\(src\).__name__\); print\(json.dumps\(src,ensure_ascii=False\)[:500] if src else 'none'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/wiki_resp.json'\)\); data=d.get\('data',{}\); print\('data keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\); p=data.get\('post'\) or {}; print\('post keys:', list\(p.keys\(\)\)\); print\('users:', data.get\('users'\)\); s=data.get\('source'\); print\('source type:', type\(s\).__name__\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/wiki_resp.json'\); const data=d.data||{}; console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(data\)\); const p=data.post||{}; console.log\('post keys:', Object.keys\(p\)\); console.log\('users:', JSON.stringify\(data.users\)\); console.log\('source:', typeof data.source, data.source?Object.keys\(data.source\):'n/a'\); console.log\('updated/post_modified:', p.updated, p.post_modified, p.post_date\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./wiki_resp.json'\); const data=d.data||{}; console.log\('data keys:', Object.keys\(data\)\); const p=data.post||{}; console.log\('post keys:', Object.keys\(p\)\); console.log\('users:', JSON.stringify\(data.users\)\); console.log\('source keys:', data.source?Object.keys\(data.source\):'n/a'\); console.log\('post timestamps:', p.updated, p.post_modified, p.post_date\);")
